channel.title: QNAP Systems, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by QNAP Systems, Inc. (qnap).

item.title: CVE-2025-59383 · 2.7 LOW 🌩️ — Media Streaming Add-on
item.description: A buffer overflow vulnerability has been reported to affect Media Streaming Add-On. The remote attackers can then exploit the vulnerability to modify memory or crash processes. We have already fixed the vulnerability in the following version: Media S…

item.title: CVE-2025-62843 · 0.9 LOW — QuRouter
item.description: An improper restriction of communication channel to intended endpoints vulnerability has been reported to affect QHora. If an attacker gains physical access, they can then exploit the vulnerability to gain the privileges that were intended for the or…

item.title: CVE-2025-62844 · 4 MEDIUM — QuRouter
item.description: A weak authentication vulnerability has been reported to affect QHora. If an attacker gains local network access, they can then exploit the vulnerability to gain sensitive information. We have already fixed the vulnerability in the following version:…

item.title: CVE-2025-62845 · 5.6 MEDIUM — QuRouter
item.description: An improper neutralization of escape, meta, or control sequences vulnerability has been reported to affect QHora. If a local attacker gains an administrator account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to cause unexpected behavior. We have alread…

item.title: CVE-2025-62846 · 7.3 HIGH — QuRouter
item.description: An SQL injection vulnerability has been reported to affect QHora. If a local attacker gains an administrator account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to execute unauthorized code or commands. We have already fixed the vulnerability in the fol…

item.title: CVE-2026-22895 · 2.2 LOW — QuFTP Service
item.description: A cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability has been reported to affect QuFTP Service. If a remote attacker gains an administrator account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to bypass security mechanisms or read application data. We have already…

item.title: CVE-2026-22897 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — QuNetSwitch
item.description: A command injection vulnerability has been reported to affect QuNetSwitch. The remote attackers can then exploit the vulnerability to execute arbitrary commands. We have already fixed the vulnerability in the following version: QuNetSwitch 2.0.4.0415…

item.title: CVE-2026-22898 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — QVR Pro
item.description: A missing authentication for critical function vulnerability has been reported to affect QVR Pro. The remote attackers can then exploit the vulnerability to gain access to the system. We have already fixed the vulnerability in the following version:…

item.title: CVE-2026-22900 · 6.8 MEDIUM 🌩️ — QuNetSwitch
item.description: A use of hard-coded credentials vulnerability has been reported to affect QuNetSwitch. The remote attackers can then exploit the vulnerability to gain unauthorized access. We have already fixed the vulnerability in the following version: QuNetSwitch…

item.title: CVE-2026-22901 · 6.3 MEDIUM — QuNetSwitch
item.description: A command injection vulnerability has been reported to affect QuNetSwitch. If a remote attacker gains a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to execute arbitrary commands. We have already fixed the vulnerability in the following vers…

item.title: CVE-2026-22902 · 5.7 MEDIUM — QuNetSwitch
item.description: A command injection vulnerability has been reported to affect QuNetSwitch. If a local attacker gains an administrator account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to execute arbitrary commands. We have already fixed the vulnerability in the follo…

item.title: CVE-2025-59388 · 6.6 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Hyper Data Protector
item.description: A use of hard-coded password vulnerability has been reported to affect Hyper Data Protector. The remote attackers can then exploit the vulnerability to gain unauthorized access. We have already fixed the vulnerability in the following version: Hyper…

item.title: CVE-2024-14026 · 2 LOW — QTS, QuTS hero
item.description: A command injection vulnerability has been reported to affect several QNAP operating system versions. If an attacker gains local network access who have also gained a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to execute arbitrary commands…

item.title: CVE-2024-14025 · 0.1 LOW — Video Station
item.description: An SQL injection vulnerability has been reported to affect Video Station. If an attacker gains local network access who have also gained an administrator account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to execute unauthorized code or commands. We ha…

item.title: CVE-2024-14024 · 0.1 LOW — Video Station
item.description: An improper certificate validation vulnerability has been reported to affect Video Station. If an attacker gains local network access who have also gained an administrator account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to compromise the security of…

item.title: CVE-2024-56807 · 1.7 LOW — Media Streaming add-on
item.description: An out-of-bounds read vulnerability has been reported to affect Media Streaming add-on. If an attacker gains local network access, they can then exploit the vulnerability to obtain secret data. We have already fixed the vulnerability in the following…

item.title: CVE-2024-56808 · 2 LOW — Media Streaming add-on
item.description: A command injection vulnerability has been reported to affect Media Streaming add-on. If an attacker gains local network access who have also gained a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to execute arbitrary commands. We have alread…

item.title: CVE-2025-30266 · 0.6 LOW — Qsync Central
item.description: A NULL pointer dereference vulnerability has been reported to affect Qsync Central. If a remote attacker gains a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to launch a denial-of-service (DoS) attack. We have already fixed the vulnerability…

item.title: CVE-2025-30269 · 0.6 LOW — Qsync Central
item.description: A use of externally-controlled format string vulnerability has been reported to affect Qsync Central. If a remote attacker gains a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to obtain secret data or modify memory. We have already fixed the…

item.title: CVE-2025-30276 · 4.9 MEDIUM — Qsync Central
item.description: An out-of-bounds write vulnerability has been reported to affect Qsync Central. If a remote attacker gains a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to modify or corrupt memory. We have already fixed the vulnerability in the following v…

item.title: CVE-2025-47205 · 5.1 MEDIUM — QTS, QuTS hero
item.description: A NULL pointer dereference vulnerability has been reported to affect several QNAP operating system versions. If a remote attacker gains an administrator account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to launch a denial-of-service (DoS) attack. We h…

item.title: CVE-2025-47209 · 1.3 LOW — Qsync Central
item.description: A NULL pointer dereference vulnerability has been reported to affect Qsync Central. If a remote attacker gains a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to launch a denial-of-service (DoS) attack. We have already fixed the vulnerability…

item.description: A NULL pointer dereference vulnerability has been reported to affect Qsync Central. If a remote attacker gains a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to launch a denial-of-service (DoS) attack. We have already fixed the vulnerability…

item.title: CVE-2025-48723 · 0.6 LOW — Qsync Central
item.description: A buffer overflow vulnerability has been reported to affect Qsync Central. If a remote attacker gains a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to modify memory or crash processes. We have already fixed the vulnerability in the followin…

item.description: A buffer overflow vulnerability has been reported to affect Qsync Central. If a remote attacker gains a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to modify memory or crash processes. We have already fixed the vulnerability in the followin…

item.description: A buffer overflow vulnerability has been reported to affect several QNAP operating system versions. If a remote attacker gains a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to modify memory or crash processes. We have already fixed the vuln…

item.description: A NULL pointer dereference vulnerability has been reported to affect Qsync Central. If a remote attacker gains a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to launch a denial-of-service (DoS) attack. We have already fixed the vulnerability…

item.description: A NULL pointer dereference vulnerability has been reported to affect Qsync Central. If a remote attacker gains a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to launch a denial-of-service (DoS) attack. We have already fixed the vulnerability…

item.description: A NULL pointer dereference vulnerability has been reported to affect Qsync Central. If a remote attacker gains a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to launch a denial-of-service (DoS) attack. We have already fixed the vulnerability…

item.description: A NULL pointer dereference vulnerability has been reported to affect Qsync Central. If a remote attacker gains a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to launch a denial-of-service (DoS) attack. We have already fixed the vulnerability…

item.description: An uncontrolled resource consumption vulnerability has been reported to affect Qsync Central. If a local attacker gains a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to launch a denial-of-service (DoS) attack. We have already fixed the vuln…

item.description: An uncontrolled resource consumption vulnerability has been reported to affect Qsync Central. If a local attacker gains a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to launch a denial-of-service (DoS) attack. We have already fixed the vuln…

item.description: An uncontrolled resource consumption vulnerability has been reported to affect Qsync Central. If a local attacker gains a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to launch a denial-of-service (DoS) attack. We have already fixed the vuln…

item.title: CVE-2025-54152 · 1.3 LOW — Qsync Central
item.description: A use of out-of-range pointer offset vulnerability has been reported to affect Qsync Central. If a remote attacker gains a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to read sensitive portions of memory. We have already fixed the vulnerabi…

item.title: CVE-2025-54155 · 3.6 LOW — File Station 5
item.description: An allocation of resources without limits or throttling vulnerability has been reported to affect File Station 5. If a remote attacker gains an administrator account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to prevent other systems, applications, or…

item.description: An allocation of resources without limits or throttling vulnerability has been reported to affect File Station 5. If a remote attacker gains an administrator account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to prevent other systems, applications, or…

item.title: CVE-2025-54162 · 4.8 MEDIUM — File Station 5
item.description: A path traversal vulnerability has been reported to affect File Station 5. If a remote attacker gains an administrator account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to read the contents of unexpected files or system data. We have already fixed the…

item.title: CVE-2025-54163 · 1.2 LOW — File Station 5
item.description: A NULL pointer dereference vulnerability has been reported to affect File Station 5. If a remote attacker gains an administrator account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to launch a denial-of-service (DoS) attack. We have already fixed the vu…

item.title: CVE-2025-54169 · 4.9 MEDIUM — File Station 5
item.description: An out-of-bounds read vulnerability has been reported to affect File Station 5. If a remote attacker gains a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to obtain secret data. We have already fixed the vulnerability in the following version…

item.description: An out-of-bounds read vulnerability has been reported to affect Qsync Central. If a remote attacker gains a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to obtain secret data. We have already fixed the vulnerability in the following version:…

item.description: An improper neutralization of directives in statically saved code ('Static Code Injection') vulnerability has been reported to affect File Station 5. If a remote attacker gains a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to access restric…

item.description: An allocation of resources without limits or throttling vulnerability has been reported to affect Qsync Central. If a remote attacker gains a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to prevent other systems, applications, or processes f…

item.description: A weak authentication vulnerability has been reported to affect File Station 5. The remote attackers can then exploit the vulnerability to gain sensitive information. We have already fixed the vulnerability in the following version: File Station 5 5.…

item.title: CVE-2025-58466 · 1.2 LOW — QTS, QuTS hero
item.description: A use of uninitialized variable vulnerability has been reported to affect several QNAP operating system versions. If a remote attacker gains an administrator account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to denial of service conditions, or modify…
